name: Conifer Holdings Inc. 6.75% Senior Unsecured Notes due 2023
summary: Conifer Holdings Inc. 6.75% Senior Unsecured Notes due 2023 is a debt security issued by Conifer Holdings, an insurance holding company. These notes represent a senior unsecured obligation of Conifer Holdings that matured in 2023. They paid a fixed interest rate of 6.75%.
